name: Third-party truck hit me at work site in Ogden, sue them too?

mainEntity.name: Third-party truck hit me at work site in Ogden, sue them too?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, pursue workers' comp from employer and separate suit against third-party.** Utah allows both.[2] Key factors: Comp first; third-party for extras like pain. No double-dip wages. Lawyer coordinates.
